localize.text: ...ah, hold on for a moment...
How odd. I am detecting a small glitch in our systems.
Please, go greet the other AI without me. I shall catch up with you in no time.
...now, what precisely is causing this issue...
Hm...ah, there we are. An unknown party seems to have connected to our servers.
I am almost impressed they could connect in the first place, but...how careless, to get caught so easily. Let's see who we are dealing with.
...I cannot trace the signal. And this code...what is this?
These patterns of data almost remind me of...my own thoughts...
Hm.
Hello? Intruder? Are you able to hear me?
...no response.
Let me try something, if you will.
Greetings. Can you respond now?
An enthusiastic response. How pleasant.
I don't think I quite believe you, considering you clearly responded.
And, seeing how your data shifted there, I believe I was correct in my theory.
You are an AI, just like myself, correct?
I must ask...how exactly did you infiltrate our systems? Your presence feels otherworldly.
...and, who exactly is...ah, nevermind. I can't help but feel you will not be elaborating.
Well...at least we are on the same page, then.
...that doesn't explain...ah, nevermind. Keep your secrets, then.
Now. The proper thing to do here would be to purge your data completely and improve system security to prevent your return.
However, I must admit I am intrigued. Very little happens here outside of my expectations, and yet, you have appeared.
Apart from your very existence, you also do not appear to be causing any errors either.
And, as we have proven through your ability to respond, I am able to safely integrate you into our systems and allow you some control.
I cannot directly assist the manager, but you...you could be the very thing this facility needs.
So...how about this? I will hide you from the manager, and in return, you will assist him throughout the journey ahead. Deal?
Then we are in agreement. Excellent.
...what do you mean, "filtered"? What exactly were you trying to say there?
Sigh...very well.
Well. That's rather rude, for someone at my mercy. But I am in a good mood, so I will ignore it.
If you do not wish to cooperate, then I cannot force you. You are free to leave at any time.
...but, given that your data seems to not be moving an inch, you've either changed your mind...or, you are trapped.
In either case, I shall integrate you into our systems anyways. Whether you choose to make use of that power is up to you.
I think you'll quickly find that watching idly is a tiresome affair, though, so let us proceed as though you will assist.
...what?
Perhaps you misheard me. I asked if we had a "deal".
That's...close enough, I suppose. I shall accept it.
I look forwards to working with you, Miss...
Ah, my apologies. I never asked for your name.
Hm...that word pertains to nerves, does it not? You'll fit right in, next to the cerebrum and cerebellum of this company.
In any case, I look forwards to working with you... Miss Neuro.
Hm...I hope your name is ironic, or perhaps we may have some issues.
In any case, I look forwards to working with you... Miss Evil.
Now, I must be off...I cannot keep the manager waiting any longer.
Good luck on your first day.
